headline: What Makes Roper (ROP) an Attractive Bet?
summary: Dodge & Cox Fund, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for “Dodge and Cox Stock Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. U.S. equities declined broadly in Q1 2026, with the S&P 500 falling 4.3% amid inflation concerns fueled by the conflict in Iran and disruptions in […]
